dialogue.intro: You came in swinging. Cute. Try and parry me — bet you forgot you could.
dialogue.reveal_on_defeat: Every hit had a window. Every dodge could cancel. You knew none of it. Take this — and try again.
dialogue.boss_side_intro: Now you're me. Watch them come for you the way you came for me.
dialogue.boss_side_win: You felt it. Time bends when you matter enough. Bring that back.
